---
title: "solutions"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
pollutantmean <- function(dir, pollutant, ids) {
  files <- list.files(dir, full.names = TRUE)
  data <- do.call(rbind, lapply(files[ids], read.csv))
  mean(data[[pollutant]], na.rm = TRUE)
}
```

```{r}
round(pollutantmean("data/specdata/", "sulfate", 1:10),3)
```

```{r}
round(pollutantmean("data/specdata/", "nitrate", 1:10),3)
```

```{r}
complete <- function(directory, id) {
  pliki <- list.files(directory, full.names = TRUE)
  nobs <- sapply(id, function(i) {
    d <- read.csv(pliki[i]); sum(complete.cases(d))
  })
  data.frame(id = id, nobs = nobs)
}
```

```{r}
complete("data/specdata", 54) 
```

```{r}
sum(complete("data/specdata", 1:10)$nobs)
```

```{r}
corr <- function(directory, threshold = 0) {
  files <- list.files(directory, full.names = TRUE)
  out <- numeric(0)
  for (f in files) {
    data <- read.csv(f)
    dc <- data[complete.cases(data), ]
    if (nrow(dc) > threshold) { 
      out <- c(out, cor(dc$sulfate, dc$nitrate))
    }
  }
  return(out)
}
```

```{r}
mean(corr("data/specdata", 150))
```
